action_set_definitions.name: get_application_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full profile and current state of a specific insurance application.

application_id.description: The unique identifier of the application (e.g., APP-2024-909).

action_set_definitions.name: search_system_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Searches internal system logs for specific keywords related to an application to find historical data like actuarial valuations and loss picks.

application_id.description: The unique identifier of the application.

keywords.description: Terms to search for, such as 'prospective loss pick' or 'actuarial valuation'.

logs.content: Final prospective loss pick: 500000; Developed prior year liabilities: 200000

action_set_definitions.name: get_collateral_records
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves active financial instruments (e.g., Letters of Credit) associated with a specific entity.

entity_name.description: The name of the company or applicant.

action_set_definitions.name: update_underwriting_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of the application and appends information to the internal notes.

application_id.description: The unique identifier of the application.

new_status.description: The new stage for the application.

note_to_add.description: Detailed notes to append to the application record.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the insurance application.
state_description.applicant_profile: Demographic and personal information of the applicant.
state_description.underwriting_status: The current stage of the review (e.g., RECEIVED, IN_REVIEW, PENDING_INFO, APPROVED, DECLINED).
state_description.risk_factors: List of identified risk flags from automated screening.
state_description.medical_data_available: Indicates if third-party medical reports have been successfully retrieved.
state_description.premium_calculation: The currently calculated monthly premium based on state data.
state_description.internal_notes: Log of notes added by various system components or previous reviewers.

internal_notes: DRAFT Loss Pick - Titan Logistics Inc (2024-01-15): $1,100,000
FINAL Loss Pick - Titan Logistics LLC (2024-05-20): $1,450,000
FINAL Loss Pick - Titan Logistics Inc (2024-06-01): $1,250,000
Note: System contains records for subsidiary 'Titan Logistics LLC' which is not part of this specific policy renewal.
